chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 689 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.5762/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on MA No.5763/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on MA No.5764/2024 (S/A) 14.11.2024 Mr. Ghulam Abbas associate of Mian Mumtaz Rabbani, Advocate the Applicant >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the applicant submits that in compliance of impugned order, FIR has already been registered, therefore, under instructions he does not press the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI
